job_summary: A Clinical Quality Assurance (QA) Auditor evaluates clinical trial processes, systems, and documentation to ensure compliance with regulatory standards and internal quality policies.
key_responsibilities: Conduct internal and external audits of clinical trials and vendors
Review Trial Master Files (TMF), protocols, and study reports
Ensure adherence to Good Clinical Practice
qualifications: Degree in Life Sciences / Pharmacy / Nursing
Experience in clinical research or QA
career_path: QA Auditor → Senior Auditor → Quality Director
skills_required: conduct internal and external audits of clinical trials and vendors
